name: aws-communication-research
description: Comprehensive AWS communication primitives and patterns for multi-agent platforms documented in docs/research/collaboration/ (4,832 lines covering SQS, SNS, EventBridge, Kinesis, Step Functions, DynamoDB Streams, AppSync)

name: user-through-agent-collaboration-modalities
description: User-through-agent collaboration requires three modalities: mediation (User A→Agent→User B), shared workspace (multiple users through agents accessing same state), and coordination (agent orchestrates multi-user workflow). Key insight: collaboration pattern choice depends on workflow structure - use lane queue for sequential/gate-driven, swarm/graph for parallel/exploratory.
